jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Miniklub
jsonLd.description:
Join the Miniklub family as a SEO Specialist in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
